page.title: Sales Orders
page.description: Manage your sales orders, track shipments, and process returns.

emptyState.title: No orders match your filters
emptyState.description: Try adjusting your filters or date range.
emptyState.noFiltersDescription: Create your first sales order to get started.

confirmDialog.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to confirm this order? This will move the order to the Confirmed status.
confirmDialog.transitMessage: Are you sure you want to mark this order as in transit? This indicates the order is on its way.
confirmDialog.shipMessage: Are you sure you want to mark this order as shipped?
confirmDialog.completeMessage: Are you sure you want to complete this order? This action finalizes the order.
confirmDialog.cancelMessage: Are you sure you want to cancel this order? This action cannot be undone and will restore inventory.
confirmDialog.returnMessage: Are you sure you want to process a return for this order? This will restore inventory and update the order status.

create.title: Create Sales Order
create.walkInDescription: No customer record required. Order will be completed immediately.
create.notesPlaceholder: Add any notes about this order...
